awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: 🎉 A curated list of awesome projects related to TDengine
awesomeListMeta.description: 🎉 A curated list of awesome projects related to TDengine

nodes.itemHTML: • TDengineGUIstars4 - A simple TDengine Desktop Manager.
• DBUtility.TDengine - C# Connector for TDengine. (.NET 6+)
• ZORM - ORM support TDenging by Go.
• APIJSONstars13.8k - A JSON Transmission Protocol and an ORM Library for providing APIs and Docs without writing any code.
• Business metrics monitoring based on TDenginestars6 - Highly customized business metrics monitoring with TDengine & Spring Boot
• tdengine_hivemqstars0 - HiveMQ to TDengine.
• tdengine-ormstars5 - TDengine ORM based on tdengine-restful-connector & php-tdengine.
• YoMo x TDenginestars1 - Streaming high frequency logs to TDengine.
• HiveMQ-TDengine-Extensionstars1 - A TDengine extension for HiveMQ.
• Taos.Studiostars76 - A GUI tool for viewing and editing data for TDengine.
• balloonfishstars8 - Electron + Vue3 + Vite2.0 based TDengine time-series database visualized management tool.
• tdengine-clientstars3 - A simple TDengine interface.
• DG-IoTstars254 - DG-IoT platform industry application extension plugin.
• dgiot_tdenginestars1 - TDengine adapter plugin.
• node-red-contrib-tdenginestars8 - TDengine connector plugin for Node-RED.
• sqlistars1.9k - ORM SQL Interface, Criteria, CriteriaBuilder, ResultMapBuilder.
• TDengine ORM Frameworkstars3 - ORM framework of TAOS Data's time-series database TDengine.
• IoTSharp.EntityFrameworkCore.Taosstars140 - Entity, Framework, EF, Core, Data, O/RM, entity-framework-core, TDengine.
• crownstars31 - crown is a simple and small ORM for TDengine.
• PDO_TAOSstars38 - TDengine driver for PDO.
• yii2-tdenginestars0 - TDengine for yii2, pdo_taos needed.
• php-tdenginestars59 - PHP extension of TDengine, supports Swoole.
• tdengine-restful-connectorstars11 - PHP extension of TDengine, support Swoole.
• imi-tdenginestars4 - Encapsulated TDengine connection pools, used in imi framework.
• pytaosstars2 - Python RESTful API of TDengine.
• NestJS TDengine Driverstars2 - NestJS TDengine Driver(RESTful based).
• taos-rsstars0 - TDengine Java RESTful Client.
• TDengine Rust bindingsstars7 - It's a Rust bindings project for TDengine.
• TDenginexstars0 - TDengine Connector for Elixir.
• NewLife.Corestars1.6k - NewLife.Core Database core.
• NewLife.XCodestars20 - NewLife.XCode Database Middle-ware.
• rsyslog plugin for tdenginestars1 - rsyslog plugin for TDengine.
• HiveMQ TDengine Pluginstars5 - HiveMQ TDengine Plugin.
• hivemq-tdengine-jdsl-extensionstars0 - HiveMQ TDengine JDSL Plugin.
• TDengine cluster for kubernetesstars14 - TDengine cluster for kubernetes.
• tdengine-client-macos-unofficialstars0 - Unofficial compiled TDengine client for macOS.
• Unofficial TDengine Windowsstars1 - Unofficial TDengine Windows client & server package.
• auto_taos_cfgstars0 - Auto generate TDengine log/data/cfg.
• Sentinel Consolestars0 - Sentinel-Dashboard with TDengine.
• Davincistars4.5k - Davinci is a DVsaaS (Data Visualization as a Service) Platform.
• tsarchivestars3 - Consume data streams from a Kafka topic, archive the data packets into the TDengine time series database.
• TD-Sparkstars0 - A java project, read from TDengine and write to TDengine on Spark.
• airQualitystars3 - 3000+ District air quality metrics: CO2, CO1, PM2.5, PM10 and so on.
• node2tdenginestars1

• Zeus IoTstars617 - Zeus IoT is the world's first open source Internet of Things distributed collection platform based on Zabbix, with the ability to collect, analyze, and store data from millions of IoT devices.
• Go Connector for TDenginestars2 - Implements internal database interface database/sql/driver of Go-lang.
• Integrate TDengine to YoMostars3 - Demonstrates how to integrate TDengine to YoMo and store data to TDengine after stream processing.
• taostdstars1 - taostd is a simple sql executor for TDengine.
• PyODDSstars203 - An End-to-end Outlier Detection System.
• PYTSDA-TDenginestars21 - An End-to-end time series data analysis system with TDengine.
• TDengine Containersstars1 - TDengine Client, Node, Adapter and Arbitrator Rootless and smallest containers as possible.
• seedlink2taos_pystars8 - A Python program that fetches seismic waveform data from IRIS and writes to TDengine database.
• TDengine interface for n9e transferstars3
• pulsar-io-tdenginestars2 - The TDengine connector connects Pulsar and TDengine.
• flink-connector-tdenginestars8
• TDengine-K8Sstars0
